channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ex-NOAA staff recreate climate data site shut down by Trump.
item.description: Former NOAA employees launched a new website with climate data, replacing a government site taken down under the Trump administration.

item.title: 'We stand with Venezuela': Houston community aids after quakes.
item.description: Venezuelans in the U.S. organize donation drives in response to the devastating earthquakes.

item.title: Former park rangers teach Black history after Trump cancels exhibit.
item.description: Ahead of the U.S. 250th anniversary, ex-park rangers lead teach-ins on history removed by the Trump administration.

item.title: Morning news summary
item.description: Rescuers in Venezuela continue searching for missing people after devastating earthquakes. Supreme Court rulings grant Trump more authority over immigration policy.
